# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    image: python:latest
    stage: test
    script:
      - pip install --upgrade -r requirements.txt && pytest -vvv . && coverage run --source=. -m py.test
  build-env:
    stage: build
    tags: [build]
    image: python:3.7-slim
    before_script:
      - apt update
      - apt install -y zlib1g-dev libssl-dev sqlite3 wget bzip2
    script:
      - pip wheel -w /tmp --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
      - pip freeze
  deploy:
    stage: deploy
    image: python:latest
    before_script:
      - apt update
      - apt install -y zlib1g-dev libssl-dev sqlite3 wget bzip2
    script:
      - export DEPLOYMENT_FILE_PATH=/usr/src/myapp/
      - git clone https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@$HOST_SERVER_NAME:5042/$NAMESPACE/$PROJECT_NAME.git $DEPLOYMENT_FILE_PATH
      - pip install --upgrade -r $DEPLOYMENT_FILE_PATH/requirements.txt
